data.body: Launched 5 parallel plan-reviews (28f1,4cdf,7ed9,d6bd,c366; ~17min each). Execution architecture: these 6 are config-removal/activation/doc REFACTORS (not new-behavior features), so held-out TDD scales down per skill guidance — RED-first contract test + the full existing regression suite IS the oracle; no manufactured edge/E2E subagent split for a mechanical deletion. Per story: (1) confirm review PASS/remediate, (2) claim, (3) add RED contract test asserting removed key rejected / behavior now unconditional (seen RED), (4) implement deletion + rewrite affected existing tests, (5) make lint+typecheck+test green, (6) commit as stacked Gerrit change + push refs/for/main, (7) close only after Verified+1. 28f1 test idiom confirmed: mirror existing test_removed_verdict_alias_ignored_and_warns in test_config_backcompat.py. Stack order: 28f1->4cdf->7ed9->d6bd->c366->5566(doc-sweep last).
